topbar.claim: Flexible packaging with purpose · Lima, Peru

hero.title: Transforming ideas,
hero.lead: We design, develop and manufacture PE and PP flexible packaging that protects, preserves and enhances the value of your product.

process.title: Full control, from resin to finished packaging
process.intro: We integrate the entire production chain under one roof to guarantee quality, traceability and compliance in every delivery.

products.title: A packaging solution for every industry
products.intro: We develop flexible packaging tailored to the demands of each industry.

home.title: Gamma Plast — Flexible Packaging Manufacturer in Peru
home.description: Peruvian manufacturer of PE and PP flexible packaging: pouches, bags, rolls and labels. Custom design, full-color flexographic printing and recyclable, compostable, FDA food-grade options.

about.title: About us
about.description: Meet Gamma Plast: we manufacture flexible packaging with quality, innovation and integrated processes —extrusion, printing, cutting and sealing— at our plant in Lima, Peru.

products.title: Products
products.description: Flexible packaging catalog by type: pouches, sealed bags, handled bags, rolls, sheets and labels. PE and PP solutions for food, industry, retail and agribusiness.

news.title: News
news.description: News from Gamma Plast and the flexible packaging sector: production capacity, sustainability and certifications.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: General contact for Gamma Plast, flexible packaging manufacturer in Ate, Lima. Send us your enquiry and we'll get back to you shortly.

advisor.title: Contact an advisor
advisor.description: Get a quote for your next flexible packaging project with Gamma Plast. Tell us about your product and a sales advisor will reach out with the ideal solution. Plant in Ate, Lima.

careers.title: Work with us
careers.description: Join the Gamma Plast team. Leave your details and CV; we'll contact you if your profile matches our current openings.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Quick answers about our flexible packaging. Need something more specific? Get in touch.

items.q: What types of flexible packaging do you manufacture?
items.a: We produce pouches, sealed bags, handled bags, rolls, sheets and labels, plus application-specific solutions, in polyethylene (PE) and polypropylene (PP).
Yes. We work with food-grade materials compliant with FDA regulations, backed by quality and safety controls at every production stage.

items.q: Do you make custom, made-to-order packaging?
items.a: Yes. We design and develop each package around your product, with full-color flexographic printing for your brand. Get in touch and an advisor will guide you from material to finish.

items.q: Do you offer recyclable or compostable options?
items.a: Yes. We have recycled and compostable materials and certifications such as RCS (Recycled Claim Standard), TÜV Austria OK compost and D2W, to support your transition to more responsible packaging.
Food and beverage, general industry, retail and e-commerce, and fishing and agribusiness.

items.q: What is the minimum order and lead time?
items.a: They depend on the format, material and volume. Send us the details of your project and a sales advisor will prepare a quote with quantities and timelines.
